brief.humanQuestion: Work has paused at a STOP gate — how should the deviation be resolved before building continues?
brief.primaryRepresentation: a live session board: status tiles, a dominant STOP gate panel, and a filterable typed timeline
brief.humanAction: read the current state, choose a gate resolution, optionally add a rationale, filter the timeline for what needs attention
brief.consequence: choosing a resolution flips working status and rewrites the candidate export; nothing resumes until the resolution is accepted in chat
brief.firstViewport: what is happening now, whether work may continue, what needs attention, and what each resolution would change
brief.export: candidate Markdown/JSON with the proposed STOP resolution, rationale, and unresolved items
brief.noJs: tiles, gate, timeline, and checks stay readable; the controls are inert — resolve by replying in chat
